name: BK Brasil Operacao e Assessoria a Restaurantes S.A.
summary: BK Brasil Opera√É¬ß√É¬£o e Assessoria a Restaurantes S.A. develops, operates, and franchisees restaurants under the Burger King and POPEYES names in Brazil. It also provides advisory and support services to Burger King restaurants, as well as sells, imports, and exports related products. As of September 30, 2020, the company had 857 Burger King restaurants; and 43 POPEYES restaurants. BK Brasil Opera√É¬ß√É¬£o e Assessoria a Restaurantes S.A. was founded in 2011 and is headquartered in Barueri, Brazil.
